Stay on this tab while your session's live — your morning bias sits just below to keep you anchored. Trade your plan; your trades sync in automatically from MT5, and the full write-up comes once the session's over.

This morning's bias
01 Trade Log?Log every trade — result, R multiple, side, entry/exit, costs, notes. Logged trades feed your win rate, R-curve, day-of-week edge, potential-R analysis, and monthly insights. The journal becomes your edge.

—Series History

Completed series of 10 — your trajectory over time.

Symbol
Your current account balance: Starting Balance (set in Settings) plus Net P&L.
Account Balance
£0
Net P&L = profit after costs. Gross P&L = profit before costs. Click the toggle to swap.
Net P&L · Gross P&L
£0
Total commissions and spread paid across all trades. Gross P&L minus Total Costs equals Net P&L.
Total Costs
£0
Wins ÷ (Wins + Losses) across every trade ever logged. BEs excluded.
Win Rate
—
Net R and Net Acc % across every trade ever logged.
Net R · Net Acc %
0
R left on the table and that gap as a % of balance, across all winning trades ever logged.
Pot R · Pot Acc %
—
Average R per trade and average % of account balance per trade.
Expectancy
—
Total winning R ÷ total losing R across all trades. Above 1.5 = solid edge.
Profit Factor
—
Equity Curve
Account balance over time
—Wins vs Losses

Side-by-side comparison of your winning and losing trades.

Total number of winning trades, total R captured, and average R per win. Higher avg R = bigger winners on average.
Wins
0
—
Total number of losing trades. Each loss counts as -1R by default. If your imported actual losses were bigger than 1R (slippage), they show as higher R in the average.
Losses
0
—
Trades that closed at or near entry, often with SL moved to BE. They contribute 0R to stats but may carry small £ costs (commission + spread).
Break-evensBE
0
—
—Max Consecutive Streaks

Longest runs across all history. Critical for position sizing.

Longest unbroken run of winning trades. Critical for confidence — and for understanding what you can ride.
Max Win Streak
0
Longest unbroken run of losses. The worst stretch you've survived. Position-size for at least this many in a row.
Max Loss Streak
0
Longest run of break-even trades in a row. High values can mean you're consistently moving to BE too early.
Max BE Streak
0
—Day of Week Breakdown?Performance by weekday — which days are your edge. WR = win rate. W/L/BE = win/loss/break-even counts. Net R = sum of R across trades on that day.
—By Symbol?Performance per instrument you trade. WR = win rate. Net R = total R. Avg R = expectancy per trade. Net = money result. Sorted most to least profitable. Appears once you've traded more than one symbol.
—Winning trades I didn't take?Winning setups you logged in the weekly review (with their would-be R) but didn't take — what your watch-list discipline is leaving on the table, shown next to the winners you did take.
Number of winning trades you logged as missed (with a would-be R) across all weekly reviews.
Missed Winners
0
Winning trades you actually took (current scope). Compare against missed winners to see how much opportunity you're converting.
Winners Taken
—
Sum of would-be R across every missed winner you logged — the R left on the table by not taking them.
Would-be R Missed
—
Average would-be R per missed winner.
Avg Would-be R
—
—Long vs Short?Performance by direction — find out if one side of the market is your edge. Same column meanings as above.
Share of long vs short trades. Detail below shows win rate and R per side — find out which direction is actually your edge.
—Reaction vs Continuation?Performance by trade type — tag trades in Review tab. Reaction = countertrend / mean-revert. Continuation = with-trend.
Share of reaction vs continuation trades. Detail below shows win rate and R per type — reveals which style pays better.
—Hold Time Analysis

Average time in trade by result.

Average time you held winning trades. Short avg = you take quick wins. Long avg = you let winners run.
Avg Win
—
No data
Average time you held losing trades. Short avg = you cut losses fast. Long avg = you may be hoping/holding too long.
Avg Loss
—
No data
Average time in break-even trades. Useful for spotting whether you're rushing or sitting too long before SL gets hit.
Avg BE
—
No data
—Trade Time Analysis

When you trade best, worst, and most often. Bucket size adapts to your sample size — narrower as you log more trades.

—Consistency — showed up vs traded
—Hold Winners longer or close BEs sooner??Compares two alternative rules against your actual trades: (A) holding winners longer based on how much of the move you typically capture, and (B) using a shorter TP based on how far price extends on your BEs before reversing. Replays your history under each rule and shows which direction is more profitable AND which improves win rate. Tier badges show conviction (too few / early / building / strong) based on sample size. Detailed per-trade breakdown is collapsed below — expand to see exactly which trades drive each recommendation.
Metric

Import from MT5
Drop your MT5 report here
.html exported from MT5 Terminal → History → Report → "Open in Web"
Auto-sync from your EA
Pulls closed trades sent by the Minimalist Manager EA — no file needed.
In MT5 desktop, open the Toolbox → History tab. Right-click the table → choose your timeframe (e.g. "Custom Period") → right-click again → Report → Open in Web. Save the resulting .html file and drop it on the Manual sync panel.
Copy your token from the MT5 sync token shown below and paste it into the EA's Inputs the first time you open Minimalist Manager:
• scroll down to the bottom
• in the empty field 'Your Session Tool sync token (account id)' paste your token
Don't forget to copy the URL from the Endpoint field and paste it somewhere safe, then press OK. Now in MT5 open Tools > Options > Expert Advisors, tick 'Allow WebRequest for listed URL' and add the Endpoint URL you just saved. Make sure Algo Trading is also ON.
MT5 sync token
—
Filter by date

Copies per trade

If a setup was executed in multiple parallel accounts, set how many copies of it ran. All session, daily, and lifetime stats multiply by this number.

Trades saved

Want to back up your data?

Your trades sync to the cloud and save on every device you sign in to, with rollback snapshots below. This download is an optional personal copy — keep it anywhere or use it to move accounts. Re-import it anytime from Import Data below.

Welcome — let's set up

A few quick details to tailor the tool to you. Only your name is required — everything else you can change any time in Settings.

Your namerequired

Used in greetings, weekly reviews, and copied posts.

Starting balanceoptional

Baseline for Account Balance and P&L on the Statistics tab. Leave blank to skip.

Trading session

Drives news heads-up timing, session-aware greetings, and rule reminders.

Risk rulesoptional

Limits you commit to — the app tracks whether you follow them. Leave any blank to skip.

% of balance
% of balance
% of balance
% of balance
% of balance
Welcome

What should this tool call you? I'll use this when offering feedback and weekly reviews.

One more thing

What's your starting balance? This sets the baseline for Account Balance and P&L on the Statistics tab. You can change or skip this any time.

When do you trade?

Set your trading session. The app uses this for news heads-up around your hours, session-aware greetings, and rule reminders.

Members-only Vault

The Media Vault — method walkthroughs, live sessions and weekly reviews — is included with Bundle PRO and 1:1 Mentoring. Upgrade to unlock it.

Your protected videos will play here — this is a preview of the player.
Sample preview — the moving watermark shows each viewer’s email, so any leaked recording is traceable.
Settings

Used in greetings, weekly review messages, and copied Discord posts.

Currency
Language 🇬🇧 🇪🇸
Translate notes to English on copy

When your UI is in Spanish, your free-text notes (bias, reflection, chart comments, weekly rule) are translated to English via Google Translate before being copied to Discord. Internet required; if the translation service is unreachable your original text is copied and a notice is shown.

Import a previously saved backup, or configure automatic backups so you never lose your trades.

The first instrument is your primary — shown on your dashboard and atop every bias and review you copy to Discord. Add more if you trade multiple instruments.

–

Controls news heads-up timing, session-aware greetings, and rule reminders.

–

Define the limits you commit to. The app checks each trade against these and reflects rule-following or rule-breaking in your bias and session-review greetings. Leave a field blank to skip that rule.

Loads a firm's typical Phase 1 rules (daily loss, max drawdown, profit target) as a starting point — adjust to your exact account, and always verify against your firm's current rules. You can also set your own values and save them as a reusable preset.

% of balance

Your account's overall loss limit from the starting balance — the line that fails a funded challenge. Drives the drawdown-headroom line in your greetings.

% of balance

When today's net loss (including costs) exceeds this, you've broken the rule. Pick whichever unit fits how you think about risk — % of balance or money amount.

% of balance

Per-trade risk cap. If any logged trade risks more than this limit, you've broken the rule.

% of balance

The profit target for the account, from your starting balance. The app tracks your progress toward it in your greetings.

% of balance

When MT5 trades auto-import, a net result within this band of zero is logged as break-even (BE) rather than a small win or loss. Set as % of balance or a fixed amount.

Number of trades you allow yourself per session before stopping, win or lose. Helps prevent overtrading and revenge trades.

Add account

Adds a parallel active account. Use this when you trade multiple accounts simultaneously (e.g. several funded accounts mirrored by a trade copier). Both accounts stay active.

Linked groups

Bundle accounts together so one trade entry fans out to all of them at once. Mirrors how a trade copier works. Each duplicated trade is independently editable.

Your subscription

Full access to the journal, stats, calendar and cloud sync across your devices.

Trade with rules

Before you log your first trade, set the risk limits you commit to. The app will track whether you're following them and reflect this in your daily greetings. Leave a field blank to skip that rule — you can edit any of these later in Settings.

Confirm

Rename
Save to Series of 10?

If you have already copied your session review to Discord, your trades are already saved to your Series of 10. Saving again will create duplicates. Do you still want to save?

Finish your trade log

Some fields in your trade log are still empty. Fill them in before you continue — or continue anyway.

Clear the previous session bias/review and start a new session?
Mark the last trade first?

Your last trade doesn’t have a result yet. Set Win, Lose or Break Even on it first — or log this new one anyway.

Upload your charts first

Both your HTF and LTF charts are not added in section 5 yet. Add them for a complete bias post, or dismiss to copy to Discord anyway.

Potential R & Pips

How far did the move actually go before reversing?

You captured —. Enter what the trade could have been at peak.

Add the potential you skipped

These trades closed in profit but never got how far the move actually ran. Add it now and it saves straight to each trade.
